name: ElevenLabs
description: Convert text to speech and manage voices with ElevenLabs
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The ElevenLabs API action to perform.

voiceId.label: Voice ID
voiceId.description: Voice ID. Used by: Text to Speech, Get Voice.

text.label: Text
text.description: Text to convert to speech. Used by: Text to Speech.

modelId.label: Model ID
modelId.description: TTS model to use. Used by: Text to Speech.

stability.label: Stability
stability.description: Voice stability (0-1). Used by: Text to Speech.

similarityBoost.label: Similarity Boost
similarityBoost.description: Similarity boost (0-1). Used by: Text to Speech.
